mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_plans (owner_id, title, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.select: SELECT tp.plan_id, tp.owner_id, tp.title, tp.start_date, tp.end_date FROM trip_plans tp JOIN trip_plan_members tpm ON tp.plan_id = tpm.plan_id WHERE tpm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tp.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_plan_items (plan_id, place_id, user_id, visit_date, item_order, visit_time, cost, memo) VALUES (#{planId}, #{placeId}, #{userId}, #{visitDate}, #{itemOrder}, #{visitTime}, #{cost}, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.nickname FROM trip_plan_members tpm JOIN users u ON tpm.user_id = u.user_id WHERE tpm.plan_id = #{planId}

SELECT tpi.item_id, tpi.place_id, p.title, tpi.visit_date, tpi.item_order, tpi.visit_time, tpi.cost, tpi.memo, tpi.user_id, u.nickname, p.latitude, p.longitude, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM place_likes WHERE place_id = p.place_id AND user_id = #{userId} ) AS liked FROM trip_plan_items tpi JOIN places p ON tpi.place_id = p.place_id JOIN users u ON tpi.user_id = u.user_id WHERE tpi.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY tpi.visit_date, tpi.item_order
